title: Payment
doc_html:
§364.  Payment

No payment to a school shall be made pursuant to this Part until the superintendent has approved the application submitted pursuant to R.S. 17:362.  

Added by Acts 1980, No. 205, §1, eff. July 11, 1980.
doc_text:
§364.  Payment
No payment to a school shall be made pursuant to this Part until the superintendent has approved the application submitted pursuant to R.S. 17:362.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 205, §1, eff. July 11, 1980.
